meaning: adj.扭动的,左右摇摆的,蠕动的,起波的
examples: You'll feel wiggly free and fresh!
That apple is crawling with wiggly worms.
These wiggly creatures love food scraps and are always eager to eat.
Hardin, the Piggly-Wiggly entrepreneur, has worked with her advisor, John Phillips, for most of the last 26 years, first at Merrill Lynch and now at Glenmede Trust.
But how do you know whether someone has withitness until she stands up in front of a classroom of twenty-five wiggly Janes, Lucys, Johns, and Roberts and tries to impose order?
